# pexip_infinity_ldap_sync_field (Resource)

Manages an LDAP sync field. LDAP sync fields define how specific LDAP directory attributes are mapped and synchronized with Pexip Infinity user and configuration data during LDAP directory synchronization operations.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "pexip_infinity_ldap_sync_field" "example" {
  name                   = "Department Field"
  template_variable_name = "department"
  ldap_attribute_name    = "department"
}
```


<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the LDAP sync field. This should match the LDAP attribute name. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `template_variable_name` (String) The template variable name used to reference this field in synchronization templates. Maximum length: 250 characters.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the LDAP sync field. Maximum length: 250 characters.
- `is_binary` (Boolean) Whether this LDAP field contains binary data (e.g., photos, certificates) or text data.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Resource URI for the LDAP sync field
- `resource_id` (Number) The resource integer identifier for the LDAP sync field
